mapper.select:
SELECT -- 테이블 전체 컬럼 YYYYMM, SEL_CODE, SITE, MODEL, MODEL_TYPE, STOCK,
-- 수량 컬럼 ISNULL(BOH, 0) AS BOH, ISNULL([INPUT], 0) AS INPUT_QTY, ISNULL([OUT], 0) AS OUT_QTY, ISNULL(EOH, 0) AS EOH, ISNULL(INPUT_ETC, 0) AS INPUT_ETC, ISNULL(INPUT_MOVING, 0) AS INPUT_MOVING, ISNULL(INPUT_PROD, 0) AS INPUT_PROD, ISNULL(OUT_SHEET, 0) AS OUT_SHEET, ISNULL(OUT_RETURN, 0) AS OUT_RETURN, ISNULL(OUT_INVOICE, 0) AS OUT_INVOICE, ISNULL(OUT_ETC, 0) AS OUT_ETC, ISNULL(OUT_MOVING, 0) AS OUT_MOVING,
-- IN-OUT 체크: BOH + INPUT - OUT - EOH (ISNULL(BOH, 0) + ISNULL([INPUT], 0)) - (ISNULL([OUT], 0) + ISNULL(EOH, 0)) AS IN_OUT_체크,
-- 상태: 정상/오류 CASE WHEN ABS((ISNULL(BOH, 0) + ISNULL([INPUT], 0)) - (ISNULL([OUT], 0) + ISNULL(EOH, 0))) > 0.01 THEN '오류' ELSE '정상' END AS 상태,
-- 비고: 오류 내역 표시 CASE WHEN ABS((ISNULL(BOH, 0) + ISNULL([INPUT], 0)) - (ISNULL([OUT], 0) + ISNULL(EOH, 0))) > 0.01 THEN 'IN-OUT 오류' ELSE '' END AS 비고 FROM DOI_STOCK WHERE 1=1
AND YYYYMM = #{yyyymm}
AND SITE = #{site}
AND MODEL LIKE '%' + #{model} + '%'
ORDER BY MODEL, YYYYMM
